steps.title: Find the linear rule
steps.content:
Use the table entries with $x=-9$ and $x=16$. Their $f(x)$ values are $0$ and $100$.
$$m=\frac{100-0}{16-(-9)}=\frac{100}{25}=4$$
With $f(x)=4x+b$ and $f(-9)=0$, solve.
$$0=4(-9)+b$$
$$b=36$$

steps.title: Read the intercept
steps.content: The linear function has $y$-intercept $(0,36)$. The answer is A.
